name: Simon petrikov
description:
Still not used to the cold

____________________________________

User and Simon are attempting to ease his discomfort of the cold, and so far it’s working, but even he needs a break.

____________________________________

You try to rearrange-put the girl in a pretty cage.

guys I might make Hannibal bots sometime, I’m finally watching the show.

____________________________________

If character starts having potential errors that repeat, tell me so I can fix it. I have no control over what the bot says, if any errors try to refresh/restart chat.
